case_title: AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. VS ORTIZ, RAFAEL A. et al

docket_entries.description: SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF MAY-23-1994, GRANTED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,755.00 FILED BY AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ORTIZ, RAFAEL A. ORTIZ, MIRNA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-29-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ORTIZ, MIRNA
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ORTIZ, RAFAEL A.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT ORTIZ, RAFAEL A. HEARING SET FOR MAY-23-1994 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ORTIZ, RAFAEL A. ORTIZ, MIRNA $550.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $625.00, STAYED UNTIL 8/30/94. DEFT MUST SURRENDER PROPERTY USE TO SECURE THIS LAON & PAY $550. & KEEP THE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-29-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-13-1994 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
THE PROPERTY. DEFT MUST NOTIFY PLFT BY 8/30/94 & ALLOW PLFT TO PICK UP SAID PROPERTY. WRISTWATCH, BRACELET, RING. CHAIN ARE EXCLUDED & NOT RETURNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ORTIZ, RAFAEL A. ORTIZ, MIRNA $1,755.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,830.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT ORTIZ, RAFAEL A.
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 23469, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ORTIZ, RAFAEL A. ORTIZ, MIRNA JUDGM. ENTERED IN SCA 23469 ON 12-1-94. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
